label: VWAP Trend
signal: Direction of dislocation from session VWAP; VWAP-order fees.
description: VWAP-cross on 5-minute intraday bars. Enters long at 09:30 if close > VWAP*(1+threshold), short if close < VWAP*(1-threshold). Flips position whenever price crosses VWAP, but flips are suppressed for a minimum hold window (debounces whipsaws). Exits at a fixed time-of-day close.
